h1.visual_description: Centered, Bold, Large Font Size (~16-18pt), Title Case, positioned between horizontal rules on the first page.
h1.example_text: ContextFlow: Context-Aware Flow Matching for Trajectory Inference from Spatial Omics Data

h3.visual_description: Left-aligned, Bold, Hierarchical Numbering (e.g., 2.1., 3.2.), Font Size ~11pt.

h4.visual_description: In-line or Block, Bold-Italic or Bold, often followed by a period, used for sub-sections or paragraph headers.

visual_matchers.pattern: Numbered block with 'Algorithm' prefix, horizontal rules top/bottom, monospace font for logic.
Centered table with 'Table X.' caption above, horizontal rules for header and footer, no vertical lines.
Centered image or plot with 'Figure X.' caption below, often containing sub-labels like (a), (b).
Indented block with 'Theorem X.' or 'Proposition X.' in bold-italic.
Centered equations with right-aligned parenthetical numbering.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX style. Inline: $...$, Block: $$...$$ or numbered environments.
markdown_grammar.table_style: Standard Markdown pipe tables with alignment based on column content.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-Year format in blue text (e.g., Lipman et al., 2023).

layout_info.header_footer_pattern: Header contains a centered running title above a horizontal rule; Footer contains a centered page number.
